name: io.github.filcuk/planka
description: MCP server for PLANKA kanban boards. Full CRUD for cards, tasks, comments, and labels.

environmentVariables.name: PLANKA_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Agent API key for X-Api-Key authentication (recommended). Falls back to email/password when unset.

environmentVariables.name: PLANKA_AGENT_EMAIL
environmentVariables.description: Email/username for credential authentication when PLANKA_API_KEY is not set

environmentVariables.name: PLANKA_AGENT_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: Password for credential authentication when PLANKA_API_KEY is not set

environmentVariables.name: PLANKA_TERMS_LANGUAGE
environmentVariables.description: Language code for automatic terms acceptance on first credential login (default: en-US)

environmentVariables.name: PLANKA_ALLOW_DESTRUCTION
environmentVariables.description: Set to true, 1, or yes to allow delete-category tools to execute server-side

environmentVariables.name: PLANKA_MAX_ATTACHMENT_MB
environmentVariables.description: Maximum file attachment upload/download size in megabytes (default: 15)
